title: Family
description: Story-led family sessions that capture connection, laughter and the real moments in between.
coverAlt: Family photography by Shaney Hansen Photography
seoTitle: Family Photographer Lichtenburg | Shaney Hansen Photography
seoDescription: Natural, warm family photography in Lichtenburg and across South Africa by Shaney Hansen Photography.
